channel.title: Edgar's Personal Wiki
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Edgar's Personal Wiki

item.title: Edgar's Personal Wiki
item.description: Edgar’s Personal Wiki Public notebook This is the public edge of a private working wiki: source-backed notes about software, systems, books, institutions, and the moments where fiction explains reality better than reality explains itself.

item.title: ai-assisted-decipherment
item.description: AI-Assisted Decipherment AI-assisted decipherment is the use of AI-built tools, scripts, search workflows, or corpus systems to help humans test hypotheses about undeciphered scripts and ancient languages.

item.title: consumer-medical-imaging
item.description: Consumer Medical Imaging Consumer medical imaging is the idea that body scans become frequent, convenient, and personally accessible rather than rare, expensive, and primarily clinic-initiated.

item.title: developer-tools
item.description: Developer Tools Developer tools, in Michael Bolin’s Peterman Pod episode, are high-leverage engineering systems because they change how quickly and effectively other engineers can build.

item.title: machine-usefulness
item.description: Machine Usefulness Machine usefulness is Power and Progress’s alternative to the machine-intelligence frame.

item.title: tom-di-mino
item.description: Tom Di Mino Tom Di Mino is described by AI Clambake as a self-taught AI engineer and amateur linguist who claims to have deciphered Linear A.

item.title: index
item.description: Post-AI World Post-AI world is this wiki’s working section for the social, institutional, and personal consequences of advanced AI becoming a central economic and political force.

item.title: scientific-acceleration
item.description: Scientific Acceleration Scientific acceleration is the post-AI question of what happens when AI speeds discovery faster than existing scientific, regulatory, and deployment institutions can absorb.

item.title: ai-engineer-claims-to-have-cracked-linear-a
item.description: AI Engineer Claims to Have Cracked Linear A AI Engineer Claims to Have Cracked Linear A is a 2026-06-16 AI Clambake article reporting that Tom Di Mino claims to have deciphered the Minoan script Linear A.

item.title: midjourney-medical
item.description: Midjourney Medical Midjourney Medical is a Midjourney announcement for a consumer medical-imaging project built around a fast ultrasound scanner and a spa-like service environment.
